title: Turkish-Style Adana Kebap with Gooey Egg
description: A flavorful and spicy Turkish-inspired dish featuring marinated adana kebap served with a gooey egg and served with a side of turkish salad.

ingredients.name: adana kebap
ingredients.notes: look for vegetarian or vegan option

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Cook adana kebap according to package instructions.
Meanwhile, toast turkish bread and slice in half.
In a separate skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
Add marinated tofu and cook until golden brown.
Assemble the dish by placing cooked adana kebap on toasted bread, topping with tofu, and serving with a side of salad.
To make the gooey egg, crack an egg into a hot skillet and cook until the whites are set and the yolks are still runny.
Serve the gooey egg on top of the kebap and bread.
Garnish with molten cheese and serve immediately.
